stemHtml: An aircraft goes around to avoid a vehicle crossing the runway. An investigation is launched per ICAO Annex 13. What is its sole purpose?

options.a: To prevent such incidents from recurring.
options.b: To verify that flight crew, ATC, and all units followed correct procedures.
options.c: To assign appropriate blame or liability to the responsible party.
options.d: To collect factual data for subsequent judicial proceedings.
